info.title: Missing required arguments, exiting...
info.description:
Watchman 2.0.0+6360ec8eefaca763ae9c30fbdea256263ad5162a

--RunMode                                    (Default: DryRun) RunMode is one
of 'TestConfig', 'DryRun' or
'GenerateAlarms'
--AwsAccessKey                               The access key to the AWS account
to connect to
--AwsSecretKey                               The secret key to the AWS account
to connect to
--AwsRegion                                  The AWS region
--AwsProfile                                 The name of the AWS profile to
use for credentials
--ConfigFolder                               Required. The location of the
config files
--Verbose                                    (Default: false) Detailed output
--TemplateS3Path                             Base s3 path for cloudformation
template deployment
--WriteCloudFormationTemplatesToDirectory    Output cloudformation templates
to folder instead of deploying
--AwsLogging                                 (Default: false) Enable AWS SDK
logging
--help                                       Display this help screen.
--version                                    Display version information.
